features: Dove Advanced Care Go Fresh Pomegranate & Lemon Verbena Scent Anti-Perspirant Aerosol features an alcohol-free, kind-to-skin formula
This Go Fresh women's deodorant spray gives up to 72 hours of protection against sweat and odour
This aerosol features Pro-Ceramide technology that retains moisture deep within your skin
Featuring Dove's most advanced formulation, this anti-perspirant deodorant delivers Dove's kindest to skin formula ever
Infused with a long-lasting lemon verbena & pomegranate scent, this deodorant leaves you feeling refreshed and confident
Globally, Dove deodorant is not tested on animals, with our products being certified as cruelty-free and PETA approved vegan
description: Product Description Caring for your underarms is an important part of any skin care routine. With Dove Advanced Care Go Fresh Pomegranate & Lemon Verbena Scent Anti-Perspirant Aerosol, you can give your skin the care it deserves, while feeling fresh with 72-hour protection from odour and sweat. Infused with a crisp, fruity aroma to keep you feeling invigorated throughout the day, this anti-perspirant women's deodorant spray is your instant pick-me-up. This moisturising deodorant is infused with revolutionary Pro-Ceramide technology, featuring moisturising agents that work like water magnets to draw in moisture, as well as premium caring ingredients that deliver softer, smoother underarm skin. With the utmost care, this moisturising deodorant boosts your skin and helps to reduce underarm irritation caused by shaving. To experience the freshness of the lemon verbena and pomegranate fragrance, hold this anti-perspirant deodorant approximately 15 cm away from your skin and spray for one to two seconds on each underarm. Dove Advanced Care Go Fresh Pomegranate & Lemon Verbena Scent Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Spray comes in a 100% recyclable metal can that's made with 25% recycled aluminium, which is infinitely recyclable, so you can care for your skin and the planet. Thanks to our compressed technology, this 200 ml aerosol spray lasts just as long as our previous 250 ml can – but with less packaging. This improved design reduces the amount of gas needed, but you still get the same amount of protection with every spray. PETA certified as cruelty-free, Dove products carry PETA’s Beauty Without Bunnies logo for added peace of mind. *within the stratum corneum Ingredients Butane, Isobutane, Propane, PPG-14 Butyl Ether, Cyclopentasiloxane, Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate, Parfum, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Glycine, Calcium Chloride, Octyldodecanol, BHT, Propylene Carbonate, Dimethiconol, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Benzyl Alcohol, Citral, Citronellol, Eugenol, Limonene, Linalool. Directions Hold the anti-perspirant deodorant approximately 15 cm away from your skin and spray for one to two seconds on each underarm. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
